title: Bee Removal in Whitestone, Queens | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Whitestone, Queens. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Serving homes near Francis Lewis Park & Beechhurst. Call today!
intro: Whitestone residents facing bee infestations need fast, safe, and professional removal services to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in humane bee removal throughout Whitestone, from the waterfront homes near the Bronx-Whitestone Bridge to the historic residential streets surrounding St. Luke's Church. Our licensed technicians provide effective bee extraction while prioritizing the safety of your household and the preservation of these important pollinators.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Whitestone's unique mix of single-family homes, co-ops, and waterfront properties with tailored bee removal solutions. Our team uses environmentally responsible methods, offers same-day emergency service, and provides transparent pricing with no hidden fees—making us the trusted choice for Whitestone homeowners.
localContext: Whitestone's tree-lined streets, proximity to the waterfront, and abundance of gardens and flowering landscapes make it an attractive habitat for honey bees, carpenter bees, and yellow jackets, especially during spring and summer months. From the Tudor-style homes near Malba to the established neighborhoods along 14th Avenue, our team understands the specific pest challenges facing this charming Queens community.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Whitestone?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Whitestone typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the location of the hive, colony size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no obligation, ensuring you understand all costs before we begin work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Whitestone?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Whitestone and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Our team can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call for urgent situations, especially when bees pose an immediate threat to children, pets, or individuals with allergies.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane relocation of honey bee colonies, working with local beekeepers to safely transfer hives. For aggressive species like yellow jackets or carpenter bees causing structural damage, we use targeted removal methods that protect your property while minimizing environmental impact.

faqs.question: What areas of Whitestone do you service?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive bee removal services throughout all of Whitestone, including Beechhurst, Malba, and areas near Francis Lewis Park, the Whitestone Bridge, and along the Cross Island Parkway. Our technicians are familiar with the diverse housing types in the area, from waterfront estates to co-op buildings and single-family homes.
